query: SELECT quality, slot, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(hp_bonus) as avg_hp, AVG(attack_bonus) as avg_atk, AVG(defense_bonus) as avg_def, AVG(speed_bonus) as avg_spd, MIN(hp_bonus) as min_hp, MAX(hp_bonus) as max_hp FROM game_equipment_catalog GROUP BY quality, slot ORDER BY FIELD(quality,'white','green','blue','purple','orange','red'), slot;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT quality, slot, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(hp_bonus) as avg_hp, AVG(attack_bonus) as avg_atk, AVG(defense_bonus) as avg_def, AVG(speed_bonus) as avg_spd, MIN(hp_bonus) as min_hp, MAX(hp_bonus) as max_hp FROM game_equipment_catalog GROUP BY quality, slot ORDER BY FIELD(quality,'white','green','blue','purple','orange','red'), slot;
